title: osteospermum nervosum
intro: Osteospermum nervosum, also known as the Nervous Daisy or Blue Eyed Daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing nervous disorders, relieving muscle cramps, and reducing stress and anxiety. Osteospermum nervosum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including insomnia, headaches, and digestive issues.
